query: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM master_artist_types; SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM master_service_types; SELECT DISTINCT masterServiceTypeId FROM jobs WHERE masterServiceTypeId IS NOT NULL LIMIT 20;
